title: NumFlux
description:
Mod that speeds up overall math of game.

Compatible with other server-related performance mods.
body:
# About ➗: ![fa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c152554bb3141433b6dca087131f96f00a876ba.png) ![qu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/554809ee9ae740db0707b7cd1420d937b490cd6b.png) ![neo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d6378864df2d8f2699289ec7f439e26b5c8db60.png) ![r_a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1af8d2c05404a55bd19f8371deb03b7435143a43.png)
Mod is a fork of [GPUBooster](https://modrinth.com/mod/gputape). It only affects the server-side of the game. Since 1.0.4 includes Palladium server features. Performance boost ≈ 3-7% ### Features ✨: - Fast math operations - Fast random - Fast perlin noise samples - Fast AABB(Hitboxes) direction - Caching system properties ### Other my mods: - [GPUBooster](https://modrinth.com/mod/gputape)(Client-size optimizations) - [H+](https://modrinth.com/mod/h_plus)(New content & Difficulty Improvements) - [EnlightenedBlockEntities/EBEReforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe-forge)(Fork of enchanced block entities)[DISCONTINUED] - [Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/mpalladium)(Optimization) - [MovieMaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/moviemaker)(Content)
